detection_context: Stored artifact hash differs from the hash referenced at review time.
reproduction_steps: Generate a synthetic build attestation record.
Record an original artifact hash in provenance metadata.
Alter the stored artifact hash before reviewer retrieval.
notes: Synthetic tampering case for hash mismatch detection.

detection_context: Evidence appears in the pipeline without an approved export path or approver chain.
reproduction_steps: Create a synthetic access review export.
Replace the expected export job identifier with an unapproved upload path.
Remove the expected approver chain metadata.
notes: Tests whether unauthorized generation is distinguished from a simple missing field.

detection_context: Deployment time precedes approval time in a sequence that should not be possible under the simulated policy.
reproduction_steps: Generate an approved change request.
Assign a deployment timestamp.
Adjust the approval timestamp so it occurs after deployment.

detection_context: An unexpected transform stage appears between collection and storage.
reproduction_steps: Create a normal policy attestation path.
Insert an unplanned transform identifier into the provenance chain.
Retain otherwise valid metadata to isolate the anomaly.
notes: Models pipeline injection without operational exploit detail.

detection_context: A scan summary is reused in a later reporting period without a fresh collection event.
reproduction_steps: Generate a scan summary tied to one reporting period.
Reference the same synthetic artifact in a later period.
Omit a new collection or validation event.

detection_context: The record lacks a required signature reference needed to verify the deployment proof path.
reproduction_steps: Create a synthetic deployment proof record.
Remove the signature reference from provenance metadata.
Keep the artifact path intact.
notes: Used to test provenance gap handling.

detection_context: Control example with consistent provenance and matching integrity signals.
reproduction_steps: Generate a synthetic cloud configuration snapshot.
Preserve matching collection and review hashes.
Retain the expected provenance chain.
notes: Negative control record for evaluation balance.

detection_context: Approval metadata references an unapproved actor and channel combination.
reproduction_steps: Create a synthetic exception approval record.
Substitute the expected approver with an unapproved synthetic service account.
Swap the approval channel to an unauthorized path.

detection_context: The supporting link appears to have been created after the incident was reported as fully closed.
reproduction_steps: Generate a synthetic incident closure record.
Add a supporting postmortem link.
Move the link creation timestamp to a later inconsistent time.

detection_context: A sidecar upload job appears in the provenance chain with no matching simulation rule.
reproduction_steps: Create a synthetic control test record.
Insert an unexpected job identifier into provenance metadata.
Leave test status unchanged to isolate pipeline behavior.

detection_context: Attachment hash at review does not match the synthetic collection hash.
reproduction_steps: Generate a synthetic vendor review attachment.
Record a collection-time hash.
Replace the review-time hash with a conflicting value.

detection_context: The same report is reused for a later period without a new population snapshot.
reproduction_steps: Generate a synthetic training completion report.
Copy the report into a later reporting period.
Preserve the original population version to reveal reuse.
